prompt: I just finished learning about caching and CDN (Day 6-7). Let's continue to the next topic - Database Selection.

assertions.name: runs-step-a-review
assertions.description: Starts with Step A review of previous topic (caching)

assertions.name: checks-mistake-registry
assertions.description: References or checks Mistake Registry for unresolved items

assertions.name: uses-analogy-intro
assertions.description: Step B introduces Database Selection with a real-life analogy

assertions.name: shows-chunk-map
assertions.description: Step C presents a numbered chunk map for the topic

assertions.name: feynman-gate-recall
assertions.description: Asks student to explain a chunk in their own words (Recall)

assertions.name: feynman-gate-transfer
assertions.description: Asks an application/comparison question after recall (Transfer)

assertions.name: teaching-quality
assertions.description: Provides clear, beginner-friendly explanation of the concept
